channel.title: MSBuild on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in MSBuild on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: dotnet: AI-Powered MSBuild Investigation with the Microsoft Binlog MCP Server
item.description:
Microsoft introduced the Binlog MCP Server for investigating MSBuild build failures and performance issues with AI. It provides 15 specialized tools for analyzing MSBuild binary logs through an AI assistant.

  • Source: .NET
